public_reputation: Known around Tariff Lantern Court through day-to-day work as faith-culture liaison.
appearance: Talandra Quillfire carries the marks of faith-culture liaison in ink, rain, and polished cloth: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: Treats custom as live infrastructure and corrects social missteps before they harden into offense. In Tariff Lantern Court, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of faith-culture liaison in and around Tariff Lantern Court, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Tariff Lantern Court while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to reputational exposure is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Talandra Quillfire can draw the party into a locality problem centered on faith-culture liaison duties in Tariff Lantern Court.
Talandra Quillfire becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with tariff abuse, smuggling of notes around Tariff Lantern Court.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Talandra Quillfire is immediately readable as a faith-culture liaison tied to Tariff Lantern Court.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Tariff Lantern Court: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Talandra Quillfire presents as someone shaped by the duties of a faith-culture liaison and the daily pressures of Tariff Lantern Court.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a faith-culture liaison, and proof that strangers will not make Tariff Lantern Court harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Talandra Quillfire refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a faith-culture liaison too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can explain expected conduct and turn cultural knowledge into safe passage or trust.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Talandra Quillfire adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Talandra Quillfire always knows more about Tariff Lantern Court than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a faith-culture liaison in Tariff Lantern Court.
social_texture: Talandra Quillfire speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Tariff Lantern Court, people read them as socially alert, procedural, and sensitive to status.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to favors and tariffs; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but reputational exposure becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Talandra touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Talandra Quillfire when the party needs a socially grounded face for Tariff Lantern Court: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
